docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT ELOI, ADRIAN J. SUMMONS ISSUED
